The '''Enmaekeda Nebula''' was a small tumultuous ball of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] matter located within the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was home to [[Borvo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] thugs. The restricted [[Old Trade Federation Route/Legends|Old Trade Federation Route]] passed through this [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]].

{{Neb-stub}}
